Veterans Benefits: Texas has no state individual income tax and provides disabled-veteran property-tax exemptions, including a total residence-homestead exemption for qualifying veterans with a 100% service-connected disability or individual-unemployability rating. Texas Veterans Commission programs also include employment preference and education benefits.
LGBTQSource: HRC 2024 Municipal Equality Index: Amarillo final score 56. MAP Texas LGBTQ Policy Score: -6.75/49 (Negative).
Description: Amarillo is a Texas Panhandle regional center with an in-city VA health system, relatively attainable housing, no state income tax, and access to Palo Duro Canyon trails and regional museums. Pantex, a major National Nuclear Security Administration weapons facility near Amarillo, anchors the area’s defense economy. Tradeoffs include windy, dry weather with winter freezes, a restrictive medical-only cannabis program, high 2024 violent-crime rate, and strongly conservative Potter County presidential results.
